rationale.fidelity: Correctly models ex ante disclosure probabilities, two messages, Bayes plausibility, latent quality and test uncertainty, posterior-driven receiver actions, and expected completed transactions as the objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: Actor, trigger, choices, information, stakes, constraints, mechanism, persuasion trade-off, counterfactual, and operational limits are all explicit.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly contribution is asserted; the response appropriately treats novelty as unsupported without literature or results.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Labels posterior-threshold receiver behavior as a model assumption and rejects accuracy, surplus, and welfare implications from more transactions.
rationale.prose_clarity: Technically precise and organized, though longer than necessary and affected by encoding artifacts.
rationale.overall: A complete and faithful information-design framing with strong objective and welfare discipline.
